accepted: five capability-based reference builds covering energy, machine telemetry, human messaging, beacon sensing and recursive federation
open build, reuse existing and hybrid as equal delivery routes
closed JSON Schema contracts for reference builds and reuse adapters
capability-role BOMs with substitutable component classes and no single-source requirement
version-bounded adapters with limitations, fallback, disable and evidence fields
discovery-first construction and reuse guides with verification, rollback and maintenance boundaries
separation of machine telemetry and human messaging planes in shared deployments
governed residual register with controlled, planned and evidence-required dispositions
not_accepted: physical construction, hardware possession, procurement or vendor endorsement
field performance, range, capacity, interoperability, safety certification or regulatory compliance
promotion of any adapter to supported without evidence for the exact version and combination
72-hour energy autonomy, solar sustainability or RF coexistence claims
field-ready assembly, calibration or operational SOP readiness
OS-08 or any P1a physical-validation task
